faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you should know before you join PAYCHEK

items.aHtml:
Yes—and no.

• Yes, because journaling stays effortless. In seconds you log Forex, Crypto or Indices without wrestling with brittle spreadsheets.

• No, because PAYCHEK runs a disciplined analytics stack behind the scenes—turning your entries into robust performance KPIs plus a playbook audit that exposes psychological slip-ups.

In short: entry stays simple; the insights read like institutional research.
Absolutely. Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never resell trading statistics—you remain the sole owner of everything you capture.

items.q: How does the free trial work?
items.aHtml: Signup unlocks seven full days of every Pro capability. After the trial ends you choose Pro—or stay on Lite with the essentials still available.

items.q: Can I cancel whenever I want?
items.aHtml: Yes. There is no minimum term—cancel Pro anytime from billing settings while keeping access until the paid period concludes.
All major liquid markets—Forex, crypto, indices, commodities and equities. Track every asset consistently inside one playbook.
Yes. Log trades wherever you execute, sync instantly across devices and continue deep reviews on desktop when you want the full canvas.

footer.slogan: The operating system serious traders rely on when raw data must become repeatable edge.

modals.trialNoteHtml: Your 7-day trial activates instantly
